name: Camera Web
summary: Capture frames and status from browser-accessible cameras.
description: Camera Web is an if-uri urirun connector for capture frames and status from browser-accessible cameras. It is represented in the public catalog so the connector can be discovered, versioned and linked to its repository while implementation details are completed.
useCases: Discover Camera Web capabilities from the connector catalog.
Plan flows that use camera:// URI routes.
Install or track the connector from its GitHub repository.
